name: Those Not Included In This Classification
intro: Let's build some more combinators, useful and not.

content.name: Double Mockingbird
intro: Find a term M2 such that M2 x y = x y (x y).

content.name: Tartaglia
intro: Find a term such that f x y = (x x)(y y).
Not sure if this has a common name, so we'll call it a stuttering mockingbird.

content.name: Sudo Make Me A Sandwich
intro: Also without a common name, fina a term such that f bread cheese = bread cheese bread.
